chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitution Petition No.D-186 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 28-10-2025 Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant A.G a/w Abdul Razak, I.O of PS Deenar Buriro, SIP Arbab Ali, SHO, PS Deenar and ASI Roshan Ali Gadehi, authour of FIR No.01/24. Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, D.P.G for the State. ************* None present for the petitioner. On last date of hearing following order was passed: “None is present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. As an indulgence, the matter is adjourned to 28.10.2025 with a note of caution that if learned counsel for the petitioner fails to appear or proceed with the matter on the next date, appropriate orders shall follow. Meanwhile, office to issue intimation notice to the counsel for the petitioner”. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General submits that the petitioner seeks quaishment of the FIRs No.01/2024 of PS Deenar Buriro, Kamber-Shahdadkot for offence punishable under section 5,9(d) of CNS Act and Nos.01/2024 of PS Gabidero, Kamber-Shahdadkot for offence punishable under section 5,9(d) of CNS Act. He further submits that the case arising out of FIR No.01/2024 of PS Deenar Buriro has been challaned and such report u/s 173 Cr.P.C has been presented before Civil Judge and J.M-I Kamber and the matter is pending, where evidence has been recorded. In view of the above position, the petition is dismissed. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to avail remedy available under the law if so advised. Judge Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
